prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is P-301 PEX & copper installation within 2.2 Mechanical - Piping & Plumbing. The relevant subcategory is 2.2.3 Plumbing - Supply. The observed field condition is: copper unreamed (visible burr). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors IPC, mfr specs. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 P-301 Measurement & estimation
